scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet praises Suwayd ibn al- Ḥārith for his wisdom and adds five new characteristics to their list.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet holding a scroll or parchment, pointing to the new characteristics
scene_input.setting: A desert or open space, possibly with palm trees or a mosque in the background

schema_output.scene_title: The Prophet's Praise for Suwayd's Wisdom
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 365
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of wisdom and knowledge

characters.name: The Prophet
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Suwayd ibn al- Ḥārith
characters.appearance: young man with a calm and thoughtful expression, wearing a simple white thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad praised Suwayd ibn al- Ḥārith for his wisdom and added five new characteristics to their list.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A serene 7th century desert landscape with distant palm trees and a simple white mosque in the background. Late afternoon golden sunlight casts a warm glow across the scene. In the foreground, two figures stand facing each other. The central figure seen from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle gesture. The other figure, a young woman with a calm and thoughtful expression, seen from the front: wearing a simple white thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, looking up at the central figure with a hint of pride and gratitude. Soft warm golden light, peaceful and reverent mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm beige, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
